description: The v0.4.5 → v0.4.6 diff for glm-plugin-cc itself. Captures the full set of changes that landed in v0.4.6: BigModel error-code dispatch, retry/backoff layer, verify-release.yml retirement. Chosen as the medium-size fixture because we know this code intimately (we wrote it) which makes ground-truth curation possible.
touched_files: release_card.md (excluded from fixture — meta-doc, not review target)
notes: release_card.md is excluded from the pinned diff because it's a meta-document describing the release, not code under review. Reviewing it would create circular self-reference.
